In each of these spatial partitions, we run 50 models (`trm()`) while using
randomly selected hyperparameter configurations (`tnr()`) within predefined
limits (`seach_space`) to find the optimal hyperparameter\index{hyperparameter}
combination
[see also Section \@ref(svm) and https://mlr3book.mlr-org.com/chapters/chapter4/hyperparameter_optimization.html#sec-autotuner, @bischl_applied_2024].
